examples: In prosperous northern Indian states, women whose families have failed to stump up a sufficient dowry still get killed or disfigured.
I wonder if the dowry depends on tonnage?
I only need to save up for the dowry, which is manageable.
Reliance stock became so valued that it even formed part of the dowry in some families.
In it, the man asks her for her hand but her family demands a huge dowry.
